nasb.text: Then the king of Babylon made his uncle Mattaniah king in his place, and changed his name to Zedekiah.

esv.text: And the king of Babylon made Mattaniah, Jehoiachin’s uncle, king in his place, and changed his name to Zedekiah.

cnv.text: 巴比倫王立約雅斤的叔叔瑪探雅接續他作王，並且把瑪探雅的名字改為西底家。

ccb.text: 巴比伦王让约雅斤的叔叔玛探雅代替约雅斤做王，给玛探雅改名叫西底迦。
